reviews.review_description:
A gorilla tag fan game is usually known for how good it is and silly it is.

Trolled a mod "fizzypango" and got banned for harassment and mod checking.

181 hours ban for messing around.

There is a ton of rules to follow and whenever a mod joins, the whole lobby hordes them like they are some sort of god and it ruins the game because NO ONE PLAYS HALF THE MODES.

The mods are extremely strict and banned me for messing around, general anger issues.



This was also my first time playing this game.

Well let's start with the game as I talked with people they said it's very "Skibidi sigma". I think I agree. If I were a sigma I would look at skibidi sigma. Sigma look at sigma. Game is very scaries I peez my self. Peez me me peez. Scaryz game moders is Scaryez. Agree. Pop time like pop. Pop likes pop time. I think is all I finish finish done
